default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on scaling strategy and define the Strategy team's role.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Scaling Constraint:** The 2-onboardings/week limit blocks growth. The goal is to scale without linear hiring while maintaining an 85%+ conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Strategy Team's Role:** Redefined as an "elite forces" unit for high-leverage work (escalations, audits), shifting ownership of account health to Engagement Managers (EMs).](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**KPI Challenge:** The new model requires new KPIs to measure the Strategy team's indirect impact (e.g., training efficacy, churn reduction) instead of direct client health metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [**Operational Gaps:** Key processes are missing, including a formal account health tracking system with documented action plans and a playbook for high-risk EM handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)

## Topics

### The Scaling Challenge

  - [**Problem:** A 2-onboardings/week limit on strategy sprints is the primary growth constraint.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Goal:** Scale beyond this limit without linear hiring while maintaining an 85%+ conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Solution:** Codify best practices into repeatable processes and training to reduce reliance on "hero" individuals (e.g., Ada, Marcel).](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Process Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - [No formal retrospective process to capture organizational learning from strategy sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [No proactive system to identify at-risk accounts before they become renewal problems.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Strategy Team's Evolving Role

  - [**Proposed Model:** The Strategy team shifts from owning client health metrics to an "elite forces" unit.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Account health and strategy shift to Engagement Managers (EMs).](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Function:** The Strategy team provides high-leverage services:](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
          - [**Proactive:** Training, playbooks, and best practice codification.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
          - [**Reactive:** Escalation support and health remediation for at-risk accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
          - [**Future:** A paid service SKU (e.g., quarterly SEO audits) to fund the team.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This model ensures EMs develop the intuition and self-sufficiency needed to handle client issues directly, rather than creating a ticket for every small request.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Operational Gaps & Opportunities

  - [**Account Health Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - [**Problem:** No central, actionable system to track account health.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - [**Impact:** Critical risks are missed. *Example: A CSM reported an account as "green" while the client was running a parallel beta with a competitor.*](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**Need:** A formal process for documenting risks and tracking remediation plans.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3020.0)
  - [**EM Handoffs:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3020.0)
      - [**Problem:** High-risk handoffs are managed informally (e.g., via Slack) and lack a structured process.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3020.0)
      - [**Need:** A playbook for gradual transitions to build trust and prevent client churn.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3088.0)
  - [**Fathom Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3199.0)
      - [**Problem:** Valuable data in Fathom call recordings is underutilized.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3199.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Use AI to analyze recordings for health signals, sentiment, and training insights.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3214.0)

### Capacity & Process Management

  - [**Current Process:** Kyle manually triages all incoming tickets, biasing towards immediate action over a large backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2285.0)
  - [**Challenge:** No repeatable method exists to assess team capacity. The current low volume (due to holidays) is not representative of future demand.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2391.0)
  - [**Goal:** Develop a rubric for ticket types and escalation scenarios to enable more accurate capacity planning.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)
      - [Share Andy's workflow docs with Kyle for review.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up to define the Strategy team's KPIs and escalation rules.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)
      - [Add Kyle to the Dec 15th Account Health Review meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
      - [Connect Kyle with Marisol to align on training curriculum.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3448.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)
      - [Begin drafting a V2 memo defining the Strategy team's role, KPIs, and escalation framework.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)
      - [Prepare to discuss the draft in person with Ella on Dec 18th.](https://fathom.video/share/zyc8FazRA_x3vFZ-uedxQC-SAuCtwyhk?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)
